title: 3D Vanilla-like Item
description: Mainly relief-like style 3D models for 1.13+ versions, with compliant and modifiable Vanilla-like textures support. Mostly suitable with Vanilla textures.
body:
🗡Introduction
-
Mainly relief-like style 3D models for 1.13+ versions, with compliant and modifiable Vanilla-like textures support.
- This resource pack included models and some suited vanilla-like textures, can be simply used onto Vanilla texture pack.
- Additionally, the models included are also designed for modified version with congruous Vanilla texture shapes(higher resolutions also available), which means you can paint and replace textures in a convenient general way. The list below shows relevant contents if you want customize it.

<details>
<summary>Content List</summary>

| Name/Type   | ...\ models             | ... \ textures                                             |
|-------------|:--------------------------:|-------------------------------------------------------------:|
|<material> Axe| item \ <material>_axe|item \ <material>_axe|
|<material> Hoe|item \ <material>_hoe|item \ <material>_hoe|

|<material> Shovel|item \ <material>_shovel|item \ <material>_shovel|
|<material> Sword|item \ <material>_sword|item \ <material>_sword|
|Arrow|item \ arrow|item \ aly_v3dmodels \ arrow|

|Bow|item \ bow|item \ aly_v3dmodels \ bow|

<details>
<summary>简体中文介绍</summary>

以浮雕风格为主的类原版3D模型，包含适配原版纹理的模型和一些为模型使用的原版风格纹理。  
这个资源包可以简单地和原版纹理包一起使用，予以特定内容3D效果。  
也可以用一般的纹理绘制方法来简便地绘制图像形状完全相同的纹理（更高分辨率皆可），以自定义模型的纹理。  
如果你想自定义里面的纹理，可以参考上面的 Content List。
